items.summary: Enhance the page background with visually rich, fancy, and modern decorative elements. Add animated floating particles or orbs with teal, cyan, amber, and purple hues drifting slowly across the background. Incorporate layered radial gradients and subtle geometric mesh or grid patterns behind the main content. Add glowing blurred blob shapes (CSS radial-gradient ellipses with opacity) anchored at different corners and mid-points of the page to create depth and color. The background should feel dynamic, modern, and vibrant while keeping all foreground text and cards fully readable.
